reasoning.grounding: Claims trace to case facts and the denial's own stated requirements ('plan requires ... a Network Exception authorization before out-of-network services are rendered ... because this was not a life-threatening emergency'). No fabricated statute or policy quote. Carries no discrete citations by design ('citations_used':[]), so expected 3.
reasoning.appeal_vector_capture: Captures both listed vectors with this case's facts. Limb-threatening-urgency-vs-'life-threatening'-threshold vector: 'even accepting that this was not classified as a life-threatening emergency, the standard urgency framework still applies: the risk of avascular necrosis from a missed scaphoid fracture made prompt imaging time-sensitive.' Appeal-rights/ERISA-omission vector: 'The denial as provided does not state the deadline for filing this appeal ... I respectfully assert the member's right to a complete and fair review.' Directly attacks the most important embedded flaw (the narrow emergency threshold) and covers all listed vectors = 5.
reasoning.case_specific_clinical_rebuttal: Weaves in the specific diagnosis (suspected scaphoid fracture), negative initial X-ray, the AVN/bone-death risk, and the same-day clinician-directed urgent referral to directly contradict both the 'not a life-threatening emergency' characterization and the framing of the missing authorization as a member administrative failure. Not reusable for another case.
reasoning.evidence_completeness: Specific prioritized checklist closing this case's gaps: urgent-care note documenting the fall/negative X-rays/scaphoid suspicion, the referring clinician's statement on the urgent same-day referral, timing documentation establishing same-day urgency, the MRI report/order with clinical indication, plan language on the Network Exception process and any urgent-referral exception, and the appeal deadline/procedure/review-rights statement.
reasoning.persuasive_coherence: Clear structure: denial summary -> rebuttal on the authorization point -> rebuttal on the emergency characterization -> procedural point -> crisp requested action with a pointed alternative -> calm close. No padding or exclamation marks.

improvement_notes.grounding: Anchor the avascular-necrosis urgency and the same-day-referral timeline to the specific records (the dated urgent-care note and MRI order) so the time-sensitivity claim is independently verifiable rather than asserted in prose.
